overall.description: Ancient Egyptian embalming scene from Assassin's Creed Origins, showing a priest performing mummification rituals on a body in a sunlit temple courtyard adorned with colorful columns, hieroglyphics, and large pottery vessels. The camera initially focuses on the detailed embalming process before pulling back to explore the wider workshop space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered embalming station with preparation table

events.description: camera begins to pull back from the close-up embalming scene

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the embalming ritual, focusing on the priest's detailed work

notable_agents.action: embalmer priest applying resin and performing rituals on the deceased's face
deceased body lying still on the stone preparation table

entered.detail: large column with colorful geometric patterns in blue, red, and green triangles
tall amphora with handles containing a palm plant
stone slab with the deceased body and white linen wrappings
small burner emitting smoke near the preparation area
wall paintings depicting Egyptian figures and ceremonial scenes

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a detailed embalming ritual in an ancient Egyptian temple. A priest in blue robes and golden headdress carefully applies substances to a body lying on a stone table. The area is framed by a colorful decorated column and large storage jars, with incense smoke rising and hieroglyphic murals visible on the walls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with multiple embalming stations

events.description: transitions from close embalming station to open courtyard view
secondary worker becomes visible at distant preparation table

agents.ego_description: moving through the temple courtyard to survey the wider embalming workshop

notable_agents.action: secondary worker sitting at a wooden table preparing embalming materials

entered.detail: wooden table with scrolls and tools where a worker sits
wooden beam structure supporting fabric canopy overhead
raised platform steps leading to different courtyard levels

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back from the embalming scene to reveal a spacious temple courtyard with stone paving and a wooden canopy overhead. As the view widens, a secondary worker becomes visible at a preparation table on the left, while large storage jars and decorated columns frame the space. The area contains multiple workstations for the mummification process.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with golden sarcophagus and storage area

events.description: golden sarcophagus shrine comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan across the courtyard showing the golden shrine and storage vessels

entered.detail: ornate golden shrine with detailed carvings and Egyptian figures
low stone seating with scrolls and embalming materials
opening leading to outer areas of the temple complex

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving through the courtyard, revealing an ornate golden sarcophagus shrine on the right side. Stone benches with materials line the left side, while large storage vessels and decorative urns populate the space. The view opens toward an exit leading to the outer temple areas, with detailed hieroglyphic murals covering the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate focus on a sacred ritual and gradually reveals the ornate surroundings of an ancient Egyptian temple. It begins with a close-up of a priest in blue robes and a golden headdress as he carefully applies substances to a body resting on a stone table. As the camera subtly shifts, the frame expands to include the rising plumes of incense smoke and the intricate hieroglyphic murals adorning the walls. The scene then opens further to reveal the architectural grandeur of the space, framed by a colorful decorated column and large storage jars. Finally, the perspective widens to encompass the full scale of the embalming area within the sunlit temple courtyard.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that pulls away from an intimate embalming ritual to reveal the expansive scale of a sunlit temple courtyard. It begins by widening from the central mummification scene to uncover a spacious area under a wooden canopy, where stone paving and decorated columns frame various workstations and a secondary worker at a preparation table. As the camera continues its retreat, the view expands to include an ornate golden sarcophagus shrine on the right and stone benches laden with materials on the left. The scene then shifts toward the perimeter of the workshop, passing large storage vessels and decorative urns that line the path. Finally, the movement opens toward an exit leading to the outer temple areas, gliding past walls covered in detailed hieroglyphic murals.
